rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use assume/guarantee syntax for component type contracts, assign for implementation-level bindings
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference visible ports and features only
Implementation contracts may use subcomponent bindings via assign statements
Avoid encoding AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly exposed as typed ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`
Assumptions and guarantees must be labeled with quoted identifiers
Assignments must reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not reference subcomponent paths in component type annexes
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
